news.catalyst: AGILITY ROBOTICS WILL GO PUBLIC VIA A MERGER WITH CHURCHILL CAPITAL CORP XI - WSJ

headlines.title: AGILITY ROBOTICS WILL GO PUBLIC VIA A MERGER WITH CHURCHILL CAPITAL CORP XI - WSJ
Churchill Capital Corp XI and Agility announce business combination agreement
CHURCHILL CAPITAL CORP XI - DEAL EXPECTED TO PROVIDE MORE THAN $620 MLN OF GROSS PROCEEDS TO AGILITY
CHURCHILL CAPITAL CORP XI - ALL AGILITY SHAREHOLDERS TO ROLL EQUITY AND FACE 180-DAY LOCKUP POST-CLOSE
CHURCHILL CAPITAL CORP XI - DEAL EXPECTED TO CLOSE IN 2026 PENDING REGULATORY AND SHAREHOLDER APPROVALS
